violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Chlorine sanitizer was observed to be denatured. Sanitizer line for dishwasher observed to be disconnected. Sanitizer and lines replaced/repaired at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. The sanitizer was adjusted at the time of inspection to the proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
An oil skimmer/strainer was observed to be frayed. All equipment must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
